Help Society: Do people working in this field make the world a better place? In what specific ways? Are these specific areas things that resonate with you?
Help Others: Who does this work help? How will you know that the work you do is supporting or benefitting specific people or groups?
People Contact: What do you know about the work environment? How much contact will you get with other people? Is this position in-person, hybrid, or fully remote? Will that work for you?
Teamwork: Does this job require frequently working in a group setting? How defined are the roles of each team member?
Friendships: How does the work environment promote or discourage developing close friendships among employees?
Congenial atmosphere: What do you know about the work culture at this location? Are people in roles like yours satisfied with the office culture?
Competition: How will your accomplishments be measured and recognized? Will this weigh into decisions about promotions and salary / compensation?
Make decisions: Do people working in this field typically have decision-making authority? Do people in roles like yours generally have the ability to make or impact key choices?
Fast pace: What iss the work environment like? Will there be enough activity to keep you engaged and focussed?
Supervision: Are people in jobs like yours generally responsible for supervising others? Do roles in this field typically come with direct reports or managerial responsibilities? Are there opportunities to mentor or support other employees outside of the specific requirements of the job?
Influence people: Does day to day work in this field present opportunities to engage with others and have an impact on their impressions or attitudes? Does the specific ways you could do so in this role appeal to you?
Work alone: Do you know enough about the types of projects that are common to this field? Will you be able to work independently as often as you’d like, or will your work require that you frequently work in a team or in collaboration with others? Will your independent work require frequent interactions with other people?
Independence: Are people in this field able to exert a high degree of autonomy over their daily tasks? How often will your schedule be imposed?
Intellectual Challenge: Would you find this work interesting? Are there frequent opportunities to learn new things in this line of work?
Work on the frontiers of knowledge: Would work in this field keep you on the cutting edge of an area of interest?
Expert status: Are people working in this field recognized for their expertise?
Creativity: How will you have opportunities to be innovative in this field? Do people in this field have frequent chances to be creative, in small ways and in larger ways?
Aesthetics: Will this field allow me to express my artistic side? How does work in this field lend itself to an appreciation of beauty?
Predictability: Do jobs in this field tend to have a fixed schedule? Are the tasks that employees do each day generally the same? Would you know your schedule when you went to work each day?
Variety: How much do the tasks that employees in this field do change from day to day, or from project to project? Is the work varied enough for you to stay engaged and interested?
Job security: Do people tend to remain in jobs like this long-term? What’s the employee turn-over for this type of position? Are there commonly major lay-offs in this field?
Benefits available: What benefits generally accompany jobs in this field? Are the benefits flexible? Do these meet your minimum requirements?
Recognition: How are people working in this field recognized for their accomplishments?
Risk taking: How often will you be able to try new things in this field? How important is certainty of outcome important for this field? Do people in this field have the opportunity to explore and be daring in their work?
Earning potential: What is a common entry salary for this role? What is a common growth trajectory for salaries? Does this match your expectations?
Location: Do jobs in this career tend to exist in specific clusters, geographically? If so, are these areas in which you’re interested in living? Will the areas in which you can work in this career suit your lifestyle expectations?
Physically challenging: Do you know enough about the physical demands of this work? If you require physical accommodations, can this type work meet them?
Not physically challenging: Does work in this field exceed your physical comfort or ability? If you require physical accommodations, can this type work meet them?
Flexible schedule: What do you know about the typical schedule of this type of work? Do you have specific needs for certain types of flexibility, and can work in this field meet these needs?
Status and prestige: If you ask your friends or those you care about, do they respect this type of work? Do they respect the organization or employer in particular?
Professional development: For people entering this field, is there a logical “next-step”, or a position that people often move into? Are you interested in the roles that usually come after the entry position in this field? Is there a path for continued promotions?
Job tranquility: What do you know about the work environment? Does this work depend on projects that by necessity have a rapid turnaround time? Is this work often described as urgent or fast-paced?
Work-Life Balance: What do people in thdis field say about their ability to balance their career with their lives outside of work? Will you have time to fit in the things that are important to you outside of your career if you work in this field?
Family friendly: What types of regulations and / or policies are common in this field that would make it more or less family friendly? Do people in this field who have family responsibilities have access to supports that will help with these?
Exercise competence: Do people working in this field regularly get to leverage skills that I consider to be my best? How will this field make use of my abilities?
Learn new things: Does working in this field require constant learning, or provide regular opportunities to update skills? Are there opportunities for regular professional development?
High demand: Will working in this area make you more marketable? Will it provide a necessary or highly desired stepping stone on the way to a career path that you like even more?
